title: nummularia quadriflora
intro: Nummularia quadriflora, also known as the River Sheoak or White Mangrove, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Anacardiaceae, commonly found in coastal areas of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its bark and leaves. The health benefits of Nummularia quadriflora include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from fever, as well as its potential to treat various other ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
